column1: # Gene Ontology subset -- EL++ normalized axioms
# Based on the three GO root classes and a selection of mid-level terms.
# Format: one axiom per line, tab-separated, type-tagged.
# Concept naming follows GO convention (underscores for spaces).
# Roles follow OBO relation ontology names.
# part_of ⊑ has_part  (not true in general, but included for demonstration)
